examples: Thomas L. Friedman, The World is Flat: A Brief History of the Twenty-first Century, Picador: 2007.
Stellar reviews prompted a run on the entire series, leading Picador to order four additional print runs of the first four novels.
Earlier this year, its paperback partner, Picador, rereleased the first four novels in a single volume paperback to coincide with the publication of the final book.
